= BattleCry =
The BattlyCry, BC, is a [[Clanbase]] that is being developed by [[User RuNyoufool|RuNyoufool]] which is planned to include a build in ranking system and is planned to be integrated with the  [[Liero Xtreme Alliance|LXA forums]].

[[Category:Liero Xtreme Community]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130331062434/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/BattleCry -->
